claims.summary: Gate and filter behavior may be confused with the PI controller itself.
claims.disposition: Verified current control remains PI-only and review/receptivity artifacts are evidence-only.

claims.summary: The integrator should resist windup and stale accumulated pressure.
claims.disposition: Verified actuator-aware conditional integration, leak, and clamps are explicit and tested.

claims.summary: Crowded and open states should be compared across gate and filter stages.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline copied-trace comparison that records stage contributions without applying control.

claims.summary: Filter, gain, pressure, or porosity tuning could improve receptivity.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because these changes alter live regulator behavior and substrate targets.
